info.title: Atomic.CodeGen
info.description: Code generator for Atomic Entity Framework - generates extension methods from C# attribute definitions. Features auto-project detection, orphaned file cleanup, and cross-platform support.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—
в•‘                Atomic Entity API Code Generator               в•‘
в•‘                                                               в•‘
в•‘  Generates extension methods from C# [EntityAPI] attributes   в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ

Usage:
  atomic-codegen wizard            Complete setup wizard (recommended for new users)
  atomic-codegen init              Initialize configuration (interactive)
  atomic-codegen configure         View and modify configuration
  atomic-codegen generate          Generate API files once
  atomic-codegen scan              Scan for definitions (dry run)
  atomic-codegen rename            Rename symbols (interactive/direct)
  atomic-codegen rename-at         Rename at cursor (IDE integration)
  atomic-codegen ide               Setup IDE integration (Rider)

Options:
  -p, --project <path>             Unity project root (default: current directory)
  -v, --verbose                    Enable verbose logging
  -h, --help                       Show help information

commands.name: wizard
commands.description: Interactive setup wizard - complete onboarding experience

commands.name: rename
commands.description: Rename EntityAPI symbols (Tags, Values, Behaviours, Domains)

commands.name: rename-at
commands.description: Rename symbol at cursor position (for IDE integration)

commands.name: ide
commands.description: Setup IDE integration (Live Templates, External Tools)
